name: example-review
goal: Demonstrate a bounded orchestrated review flow.

sharedContext.summary: Use this file as a template for local Claude orchestration. The first task inspects repository guidance; the second reviews the first task output.
constraints: Keep work bounded to repository guidance and local scripts.
Do not edit TODO.md or ai/state files.

tasks.title: Inspect orchestration guidance
tasks.prompt: Read the orchestration guide and agent workflow docs. Summarize the three most important coordinator rules and note any obvious gaps in the MVP.

tasks.title: Review the guidance summary
tasks.prompt: Review the dependency output. Call out any missing risk, conflict, or operational hole in the guidance and propose one concrete follow-up.
